title: AI Prompt Search Rater - Filipino
description: We are looking for AI Prompt Search Raters to support the improvement of AI-generated content in Filipino/Tagalog. Job Type: Freelance Location: Remote Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work whenever you want. Start Date: Immediately Rate: 9 USD/hour (rates vary per country. If you are based elsewhere, the rates will be different) Help Shape the Future of AI Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models? What You’ll Do The role involves performing diverse data-related tasks, including: Review prompts and AI-generated responses Annotate and label responses and their reasoning steps Compare outputs and assess quality and relevance Follow clear guidelines to ensure consistency Apply cultural understanding where needed What we’re looking for: - Native-level fluency in Filipino/Tagalog. - English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2). - AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience with data annotation, evaluation, or similar tasks. Familiarity with reviewing AI responses or following structured guidelines is a plus. What We Offer - 100% remote work - Flexible schedule - Opportunity to earn extra income - Timely payments - The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents
min_qualifications:
- Native-level fluency in Filipino/Tagalog.
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2).
preferred_qualifications: - AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience with data annotation, evaluation, or similar tasks. Familiarity with reviewing AI responses or following structured guidelines is a plus.
